<!--
Before filing: check the doc site at https://docs.activegraph.ai
first. The concepts pages cover the framework's primitives;
per-error pages under /errors/ cover failure modes; the cookbook
covers common patterns. Most questions are answered there.

Questions where the doc-site answer was unclear, missing, or
contradicted by the framework's behavior are exactly the right
shape for this template — they often surface either a doc-site
gap or a real bug.
-->

## What you tried

<!--
Code snippet or description of what you ran / wrote. The more
concrete, the easier to answer.
-->

```python
# what you tried
```

## What you saw

<!--
Output, error message, behavior. Paste the actual text rather
than describing it ('I got an error about X' is less useful than
the error text itself).
-->

## What you expected

<!-- What you thought would happen and why. -->

Framework version (`activegraph --version`), what you are building

specific LLM provider, packs loaded). Skip items that do not
apply.
